title: Drepania
intro: Drepania is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Drepania include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Drepania is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory conditions.
